overview: this text includes market name, market maturity, demographics
trends_analysis: this text includes trends in the market, such as growth, decline, etc.
strengths: this text includes strengths of the market, such growth, big sizes, etc.

weaknesses: this text includes weaknesses of the market, such small sizes, declines, etc.

gaps_and_opportunities: this text includes opportunities of the market, such as untapped niches, etc.

threats: this text includes threats of the market, such as declining sizes, etc.
new_market_potential: is there a chance u came up with a product that can create a new market? a 0 to 1 solution? are u solving a problem people don't yet know they have? if yes, we should probably tell u about it.
why_now: this text includes why now, why this idea is relevant now.
